name: Neo4j Graph Memory
description: Long-term memory backed by a Neo4j knowledge graph with auto-recall, auto-capture, and manual tools

auto_ingest.label: Auto-Capture
auto_ingest.help: Automatically ingest conversation into the Neo4j graph after each turn

auto_search.label: Auto-Recall
auto_search.help: Automatically search the graph for relevant context before each turn

archive_on_compaction.label: Archive on Compaction
archive_on_compaction.help: Archive the full session to the graph before context compaction

use_llm_ingest.label: LLM Ingest
use_llm_ingest.help: Use LLM for higher-quality entity extraction during ingest (slower, higher cost)

use_llm_search.label: LLM Search
use_llm_search.help: Use LLM for entity extraction during search queries (slower, higher cost)

apiPort.description: Port of the memory API server

apiHost.description: Host of the memory API server

auto_ingest.description: Automatically ingest conversation into graph after each turn

auto_search.description: Automatically search graph for context before each turn

archive_on_compaction.description: Archive full session to graph before compaction

use_llm_ingest.description: Use LLM for entity extraction during ingest

use_llm_search.description: Use LLM for entity extraction during search
